data.name: TitleDashboard
data.comment: the title of the main page

data.name: All
data.comment: Filter button label - show all items

data.name: WhatDoYouWantToSay
data.value: What do you want to say?

data.name: UserInputPlaceholder
data.value: How do you say that in Korean?

data.name: ExportDataDescription
data.value: Export all your learning data as CSV files in a ZIP archive. This includes vocabulary, progress, and settings.

data.name: CreateStarterVocabPrompt
data.value: Would you like me to create a starter vocabulary list for you?

data.name: WelcomeDescription
data.value: Strengthen your language skills with our fun and interactive sentence building activities.

data.name: NextScreenDescription
data.value: On the next screen, you will be able to choose from a variety of activities to practice your language skills. Along the way Sentence Studio will keep track of your progress and report your growth.

data.name: CheckAnswer
data.comment: Button to check if the selected answer is correct

data.name: MatchedAndMisses
data.comment: Header for matched and missed pairs

data.name: NewGame
data.comment: Button to start a new game

data.name: NoVocabularyAvailable
data.value: No vocabulary available. Please add words to your vocabulary list.

data.name: ErrorLoadingVocabulary
data.value: Error loading vocabulary. Please try again.

data.name: SelectAnotherTile
data.value: Select another tile to make a match!

data.name: WaitCheckingMatch
data.value: Please wait while checking your match...

data.name: HideNativeWords
data.comment: Toggle button text to enable hide native words mode

data.name: ShowAllWords
data.comment: Toggle button text to disable hide native words mode

data.name: TapTargetToReveal
data.value: Tap a target language word to reveal native words, then find its match!
data.comment: Instructions for hide native words mode

data.name: No Vocabulary
data.comment: Error dialog title when no vocabulary is found

data.name: This resource has no vocabulary to study.
data.value: This resource has no vocabulary to study.
data.comment: Error message when no vocabulary is available

data.name: NoValidVocabularyFound
data.value: No valid vocabulary words found in the input

data.name: VocabularyImportWithDuplicates
data.value: Added {0} new vocabulary words. Skipped {1} duplicates.

data.name: AdjustTextSize
data.value: • Use A-/A+ buttons to adjust text size

data.name: DoubleTapSentence
data.value: • Double-tap any sentence to jump to that point

data.name: PlanNextActivityButton
data.comment: Button to navigate to next activity in daily plan

data.name: ContinueToNextSession
data.comment: Button to continue to next vocabulary session

data.name: ReviewVocabularyStudied
data.value: Review the vocabulary you just studied:

data.name: TodaysVocabularyReview
data.comment: Title for today's vocabulary review section

data.name: ReviewNeeded
data.comment: Label for vocabulary words that need review

data.name: WhatIsThisInLanguage
data.comment: Question prompt for vocabulary quiz with language placeholder

data.name: TypeCorrectAnswerHint
data.comment: Hint for text input when correct answer is required

data.name: TypeYourAnswerHint
data.comment: Hint for text input in quiz

data.name: WordMasteredNewAdded
data.comment: Toast message when single word is mastered

data.name: WordsMasteredNewAdded
data.comment: Toast message when multiple words are mastered

data.name: AllVocabularyCompleted
data.value: 🎊 Congratulations! You've worked through all vocabulary in this learning resource!
data.comment: Message when all vocabulary is completed

data.name: NoVocabulary
data.comment: Alert title when resource has no vocabulary

data.name: NoVocabularyMessage
data.value: This resource has no vocabulary to study.
data.comment: Alert message when resource has no vocabulary

data.name: AllWordsCompletedAddingNew
data.value: 🎊 All words in this set completed! Adding new words...
data.comment: Toast message when set is completed

data.name: WordMasteredInQuiz
data.comment: Toast message when word is mastered during quiz

data.name: AllVocabularyCompletedInQuiz
data.value: 🎊 All vocabulary completed in this quiz! Adding new words...
data.comment: Toast message when all vocabulary in quiz is completed

data.name: RoundTimeForTyping
data.comment: Toast message for starting typing round

data.name: TypeCorrectAnswerExactly
data.value: Please type the correct answer exactly as shown.
data.comment: Feedback message when user needs to type exact answer

data.name: AllVocabularyCompletedInQuizShort
data.value: 🎊 All vocabulary completed in this quiz!
data.comment: Toast message when all quiz vocabulary is done

data.name: SaveAsMp3
data.comment: Button to save audio as MP3

data.name: NoAudioAvailable
data.comment: Error message when no audio to save

data.name: ImportAudioClip
data.value: Import audio clip from YouTube video

data.name: PracticesInYear
data.comment: Practice heat card title with count

data.name: PracticesRecent
data.comment: Practice heat card title for 6-week view

data.name: NoMatchFilter
data.value: No vocabulary words match the current filter.

data.name: NoVocabularyWords
data.value: No vocabulary words found. Use the + button to create your first vocabulary word.

data.name: ResourceCount
data.comment: Resource count label with count parameter

data.name: SwapLanguagesDescription
data.value: Swap words where target language appears to be English and native language appears to be Korean

data.name: AssignOrphanedDescription
data.value: Associate words without a learning resource to a general vocabulary list

data.name: ConfirmDeleteMultiple
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete {0} vocabulary word(s)?

data.name: ContinuePracticeQuestion
data.value: Would you like to get more sentences?

data.name: NoMoreSentencesMessage
data.value: There are no more sentences available for this resource.

data.name: NoResourcesAvailable
data.value: No learning resources available for association.

data.name: SelectResourceToAssociate
data.value: Select a resource to associate this word with:

data.name: FailedToLoadData
data.comment: Failed to load data error message with exception

data.name: FailedToLoadVocabulary
data.comment: Failed to load vocabulary error message with exception

data.name: FailedToLoadVocabularyData
data.value: Failed to load vocabulary data. Please try again.
data.comment: Failed to load vocabulary data error message

data.name: FailedToDeleteVocabulary
data.comment: Failed to delete vocabulary error message with exception

data.name: FailedToAssociateVocabulary
data.comment: Failed to associate vocabulary error message with exception

data.name: ResetProfileConfirmation
data.value: Are you sure you want to reset your profile?

data.name: SomethingWentWrong
data.value: Something went wrong. Check the server.

data.name: QuickPhrases
data.comment: Quick phrases popup title for conversation

data.name: NoDefinitionFound
data.comment: Message when word definition lookup fails

data.name: SentenceProgress
data.comment: Shows current sentence number and total. {0} = current sentence, {1} = total sentences

data.name: ModeTodaysPlan
data.comment: Button text to switch to Today's Plan mode

data.name: ModeChooseOwn
data.comment: Button text to switch to Choose Your Own mode

data.name: PlanCardTitle
data.comment: Title of the Today's Plan card

data.name: PlanStartButton
data.comment: Button to start a plan activity

data.name: PlanResumeButton
data.comment: Button to resume a plan activity

data.name: PlanRegenerateButton
data.comment: Button to generate a new plan

data.name: PlanSequentialHint
data.value: Complete activities in order for best results
data.comment: Hint explaining sequential flow in today's plan

data.name: PlanChooseOwnButton
data.comment: Button to switch to manual activity selection

data.name: PlanItemVocabReviewTitle
data.comment: Title for vocabulary review plan item

data.name: PlanItemVocabReviewDesc
data.value: Review words due for spaced repetition
data.comment: Description for vocabulary review plan item

data.name: PlanItemReadingDesc
data.value: Read new content to build comprehension

data.name: PlanItemListeningDesc
data.value: Listen to audio to improve comprehension

data.name: PlanItemVideoTitle
data.comment: Title for video watching plan item

data.name: PlanItemVideoDesc
data.value: Watch and learn from video content
data.comment: Description for video watching plan item

data.name: PlanItemShadowingDesc
data.value: Repeat audio to improve pronunciation and rhythm

data.name: PlanItemClozeTitle
data.comment: Title for cloze exercise plan item

data.name: PlanItemClozeDesc
data.value: Fill in missing words to practice grammar and vocabulary
data.comment: Description for cloze exercise plan item

data.name: PlanItemVocabGameTitle
data.comment: Title for vocabulary game plan item

data.name: PlanItemVocabGameDesc
data.value: Quick matching game to reinforce words
data.comment: Description for vocabulary game plan item

data.name: RoundsLabel
data.comment: Label for completed rounds in an activity

data.name: RoundStarted
data.comment: Toast message when a new round starts

data.name: RoundsCompleted
data.comment: Label for number of rounds completed in session summary

data.name: WordsMastered
data.comment: Label for number of words mastered in session summary

data.name: TotalTurns
data.comment: Label for total turns taken in session summary

data.name: SessionProgress
data.comment: Header for session progress stats in summary

data.name: ActivityCompleteLabel
data.comment: Label shown when activity is completed

data.name: ReadOnlyResource
data.comment: Message explaining that smart resources cannot be edited

data.name: DaysAway
data.comment: Number of days until review (e.g. "3 days")

data.name: StartPracticing
data.comment: Message for unknown words with no progress

data.name: StreakDisplay
data.comment: Display format for streak count with fire emoji

data.name: MasteredWithStreak
data.comment: Celebration message when word reaches mastery with streak count

data.name: CorrectWithStreak
data.comment: Correct answer message with streak count

data.name: FuzzyMatchCorrect
data.comment: Fuzzy match accepted - shows complete form for learning

data.name: IncorrectStreakReset
data.comment: Incorrect answer message when streak resets

data.name: MigrateProgressButton
data.comment: Button to migrate vocabulary progress to streak-based scoring

data.name: MigrationComplete
data.comment: Message shown after progress migration completes

data.name: ProductionCount
data.comment: Display count of production (text entry) correct answers in streak

data.name: VoiceAndQuizSettings
data.comment: Section header for voice and quiz settings

data.name: VoiceLanguage
data.comment: Label for language selection in voice settings

data.name: VoiceLanguageDescription
data.value: Select the language to configure voice for.

data.name: PreferredVoiceDescription
data.value: Choose the voice used for audio playback when studying this language.

data.name: QuizDirectionDescription
data.value: Show target language and type native (ON) or show native and type target (OFF).

data.name: AutoplayDescription
data.value: Automatically play audio when new question appears.

data.name: ShowMnemonicDescription
data.value: Display mnemonic hints during quiz questions.

data.name: AutoAdvanceDurationDescription
data.value: Time in seconds before automatically moving to next question after correct answer.

data.name: ResetToDefaults
data.comment: Button to reset all preferences to default values

data.name: DataManagement
data.comment: Section header for data management options

data.name: DataManagementDescription
data.value: Export your learning data for backup or analysis.

data.name: DatabaseMigrations
data.comment: Section header for database migration utilities

data.name: StreakMigrationDescription
data.value: Converts all vocabulary progress to the new streak-based scoring system for more accurate mastery tracking.
data.comment: Description of what streak migration does

data.name: Migrating
data.comment: Status text while migration is running

data.name: MigrationSuccessCount
data.comment: Success message with count of migrated records

data.name: GenerateWithAI
data.comment: Button to generate example sentences using AI

data.name: AddManually
data.comment: Button to add example sentence manually

data.name: NoExampleSentencesYet
data.value: No example sentences yet. Add one to improve encoding strength!
data.comment: Message when no example sentences exist

data.name: FailedToGenerateSentences
data.value: Failed to generate example sentences. Please try again.
data.comment: Error message when AI generation fails

data.name: NoInternetConnection
data.value: No internet connection available. AI generation requires internet access.
data.comment: Error message when trying to use AI without internet

data.name: SortByEncoding
data.comment: [US3] Button to sort vocabulary by encoding strength

data.name: AllTags
data.comment: [US3] Default option in tag filter picker

data.name: SearchSyntaxHint
data.comment: [002-vocab-search] Placeholder text showing available search syntax

data.name: Tag
data.comment: [002-vocab-search] Filter chip label for tag filters

data.name: Resource
data.comment: [002-vocab-search] Filter chip label for resource filters

data.name: Lemma
data.comment: [002-vocab-search] Filter chip label for lemma filters

data.name: Status
data.comment: [002-vocab-search] Filter chip label for status filters

data.name: ClearAllFilters
data.comment: [002-vocab-search] Button to clear all active filters

data.name: UnnamedResource
data.comment: [002-vocab-search] Fallback name for resources without a title

data.name: StatusKnown
data.comment: [002-vocab-search] Status filter option for known words

data.name: StatusLearning
data.comment: [002-vocab-search] Status filter option for words being learned

data.name: StatusUnknown
data.comment: [002-vocab-search] Status filter option for unknown words

data.name: NoItemsAvailable
data.comment: [002-vocab-search] Message when filter has no available options

data.name: DisplayDirection
data.comment: [001-vocab-quiz-preferences] Section header for display direction options

data.name: ShowTargetLanguage
data.comment: [001-vocab-quiz-preferences] Radio option to show Korean word, answer in English

data.name: ShowNativeLanguage
data.comment: [001-vocab-quiz-preferences] Radio option to show English word, answer in Korean

data.name: AutoPlayVocabAudio
data.comment: [001-vocab-quiz-preferences] Checkbox label for automatic vocabulary audio

data.name: AutoPlaySampleAudio
data.comment: [001-vocab-quiz-preferences] Checkbox label for automatic sample sentence audio

data.name: RequiresVocabAudio
data.comment: [001-vocab-quiz-preferences] Help text showing sample audio dependency

data.name: ConfirmationDisplay
data.comment: [001-vocab-quiz-preferences] Section header for confirmation screen options

data.name: ShowMnemonicImage
data.comment: [001-vocab-quiz-preferences] Checkbox label for mnemonic image display

data.name: SavePreferences
data.comment: [001-vocab-quiz-preferences] Button text to save preference changes

data.name: PreferencesSaveFailed
data.value: Failed to save preferences. Please try again.
data.comment: [001-vocab-quiz-preferences] Error message when preference save fails

data.name: MinimalPairsTitle
data.comment: [003-minimal-pairs] Page title for minimal pairs activity

data.name: MinimalPairsCreatePair
data.comment: [003-minimal-pairs] Button to create a new minimal pair

data.name: MinimalPairsEmptyState
data.value: No minimal pairs yet. Create your first pair to get started!

data.name: MinimalPairsSelectFirstWord
data.comment: [003-minimal-pairs] Prompt to select first vocabulary word

data.name: MinimalPairsSelectSecondWord
data.comment: [003-minimal-pairs] Prompt to select second vocabulary word

data.name: MinimalPairsCreateFailed
data.value: Failed to create pair. It may already exist.
data.comment: [003-minimal-pairs] Error message when pair creation fails

data.name: OfflineAudioUnavailable
data.value: Audio not available offline. Please connect to the internet.
data.comment: [003-minimal-pairs] Error when audio not cached and offline

data.name: AudioPlaybackError
data.value: Audio playback failed. Please try again.

data.name: TapToSelect
data.comment: Prompt to tap a field to select a value

data.name: ScenarioAskName
data.value: What should I call this scenario?

data.name: ScenarioAskPersona
data.value: Who will you be talking to? (name and role, e.g., "박지영, a barista")

data.name: ScenarioAskSituation
data.value: What's the situation? Describe it briefly.

data.name: ScenarioAskType
data.value: Should this conversation end when the task is complete (finite), or continue with follow-ups (open-ended)?

data.name: ScenarioConfirmation
CannotEditPredefined
data.value: This is a predefined scenario and cannot be edited. You can create a similar custom scenario instead.
data.comment: [002-warmup-scenarios] Error message when trying to edit predefined scenario

data.name: ScenarioCancelled
data.comment: [002-warmup-scenarios] Message when scenario creation is cancelled

data.name: ScenarioCreated
data.comment: [002-warmup-scenarios] Success message when scenario is created

data.name: NoActiveScenarioToEdit
data.value: No scenario is currently selected to edit.
data.comment: [002-warmup-scenarios] Message when user tries to edit with no scenario

data.name: EditScenarioPrompt
data.value: What would you like to change?

data.name: NoActiveScenarioToDelete
data.value: No scenario is currently selected to delete.
data.comment: [002-warmup-scenarios] Message when user tries to delete with no scenario

data.name: CannotDeletePredefined
data.comment: [002-warmup-scenarios] Message when user tries to delete predefined scenario

data.name: ConversationInputPlaceholder
data.value: How do you say this in {0}?
data.comment: Placeholder text for conversation input, {0} is the target language

data.name: TranslationInputPlaceholder
data.value: How do you say this in {0}?
data.comment: Placeholder text for translation input, {0} is the target language

data.name: Help
data.comment: Help menu item label in sidebar navigation

data.name: Profile_PasswordTooShort
data.value: New password must be at least 8 characters.

data.name: Profile_PasswordChangeFailed
data.value: Password change failed. Check your current password and try again.

data.name: Profile_DangerZoneDescription
data.value: Permanently delete your account and all associated data.

data.name: Profile_DeleteConfirmationMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete your account? All your data will be permanently removed. This cannot be undone.

data.name: Common_NetworkError
data.value: Network error. Please check your connection.

data.name: Dashboard_Mode
data.comment: Dashboard: aria label for mode toggle

data.name: Dashboard_NewUserDescription
data.value: Set up your first learning resource and vocabulary so you can dive into activities like quizzes, conversation practice, and writing exercises.

data.name: Dashboard_QuickStartDescription
data.value: Create a starter Korean resource with 20 common vocabulary words so you can begin practicing immediately.

data.name: Dashboard_CreateYourOwnDescription
data.value: Choose your own language, add custom vocabulary, or import from a podcast transcript or article.

data.name: Dashboard_StarterCreateFailed
data.value: Failed to create the starter resource. Please try again.

data.name: Dashboard_StarterAlreadyExists
data.value: A starter resource already exists. Refreshing your dashboard…

data.name: Dashboard_StarterGenericError
data.value: Something went wrong creating the starter resource. Please try again.

data.name: Dashboard_UnableToGeneratePlan
data.value: Unable to generate plan. Please try again.

data.name: Dashboard_UnableToGeneratePlanLater
data.value: Unable to generate plan. Please try again later.

data.name: Dashboard_NetworkErrorTryAgain
data.value: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.

data.name: Dashboard_NoVocabData
data.value: No vocabulary data yet. Start practicing!

data.name: Dashboard_VocabDueCount
data.comment: Dashboard: vocab due count for plan item

data.name: Activity_HowDoYouSay
data.comment: Activity label: How Do You Say

data.name: ActivityLog_EmptyState
data.value: No practice activity yet. Complete your first daily plan to see your practice log!

data.name: MainLayout_SyncingDescription
data.value: Downloading your vocabulary, resources, and progress.

data.name: Writing_WriteSentence
data.value: Write a sentence using the vocabulary...

data.name: Writing_NoVocab
data.value: No vocabulary available. Select a resource with vocabulary first.

data.name: WordAssoc_WriteClues
data.value: Write clues related to this word — synonyms, categories, sentences, anything connected!

data.name: WordAssoc_ClueBonus
data.value: Each related clue earns 1 point. Full sentences earn 2 points.

data.name: WordAssoc_TypeClue
data.value: Type a clue, word, or sentence...

data.name: WordAssoc_NoVocab
data.value: No vocabulary available. Select a Learning Resource first.

data.name: VocabQuiz_WriteOneSentence
data.value: Write one or more sentences using {0}.

data.name: VocabQuiz_OnlyMeaningful
data.value: Only meaningful usage of the target word counts toward mastery. Broader grammar feedback is still shown, but it won't penalize you by itself.

data.name: VocabQuiz_SentencePlaceholder
data.value: Write one or more sentences using "{0}". For example: {0} ...

data.name: VocabQuiz_SeparateMultiple
data.value: Separate multiple sentences with a new line or punctuation.

data.name: VocabQuiz_TypeCorrect
data.value: Type the correct answer to continue

data.name: Scene_SubmitDescription
data.value: Submit a description to see your score here.

data.name: MinimalPairs_NoPairs
data.value: No minimal pairs yet. Create your first pair to start practicing!

data.name: MinimalPairSession_NoPairs
data.value: No pairs available for this session.

data.name: SkillAdd_DescriptionPlaceholder
data.value: Describe the skills for this profile

data.name: SkillEdit_DeleteMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this skill profile? This cannot be undone.

data.name: Resources_SetNativeLanguage
data.value: Please set up your native language in your profile first.

data.name: Resources_StarterExists
data.value: Starter resource already exists! Loading your resources…

data.name: ResourceAdd_NoDuplicates
data.value: No new vocabulary words found (may be duplicates).

data.name: ResourceAdd_NoDuplicatesInFile
data.value: No new vocabulary words found in file (may be duplicates or wrong format).

data.name: ResourceEdit_DeleteMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this resource? This cannot be undone.

data.name: ResourceEdit_NoDuplicatesInFile
data.value: No new vocabulary words found in file (may be duplicates or wrong format).

data.name: ResourceEdit_NoTranscript
data.value: No transcript available to generate vocabulary from.

data.name: ResourceEdit_NoVocabGenerated
data.value: AI did not generate any vocabulary. Try again.

data.name: ResourceEdit_GeneratedWithSkipped
data.value: Generated {0} words: {1} new, {2} linked, {3} skipped (already in resource)

data.name: VocabWordEdit_LemmaPlaceholder
data.value: e.g., 가다 for 갔다, 가요, etc.

data.name: VocabWordEdit_MnemonicStoryPlaceholder
data.value: A silly story or memory hook to help recall this word...

data.name: VocabWordEdit_SelectResourcesNote
data.value: Select resources to associate with this word.

data.name: VocabWordEdit_DeleteMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete '{0}'? This cannot be undone.

data.name: VocabWordEdit_BothTermsRequired
data.value: Both target and native language terms are required.

data.name: VocabWordEdit_DuplicateExists
data.value: A vocabulary word with these terms already exists.

data.name: VocabWordEdit_SaveFailed
data.value: Failed to save the vocabulary word. Please try again.

data.name: VocabWordEdit_FamiliarNote
data.value: Got it -- we trust you on this one. We will check in occasionally to keep it fresh.

data.name: Vocabulary_AddWord
data.comment: Button text (legacy key — use Vocabulary_Add instead)

data.name: Vocabulary_Add
data.comment: Button text for adding vocabulary (word, phrase, or sentence)

data.name: Vocabulary_NoActiveProfile
data.value: No active user profile. Please select a profile first.

data.name: Vocabulary_DuplicatesFound
data.value: Found {0} group(s) of duplicate words with {1} extra record(s).

data.name: Vocabulary_FocusedNote
data.value: Focused on {0} so you can manage this word's copies faster.

data.name: Vocabulary_NoMatchingScan
data.value: No duplicate records matched this scan.

data.name: Vocabulary_LemmaComplete
data.value: Lemma population complete: updated {0} of {1} words

data.name: Settings_PromptSideNote
data.value: Choose which side of the vocab card is shown as the prompt.

data.name: Settings_ModalitiesNote
data.value: Choose which cues to show for the prompt. If a photo isn't available, the quiz falls back to text.

data.name: Settings_OneModalityRequired
data.value: At least one question modality is required. Falling back to text.

data.name: Settings_NoReleaseNotes
data.value: No release notes available for this version

data.name: ResourceEdit_NoTranscriptForVocab
data.value: No transcript available to generate vocabulary from.

data.name: ResourceEdit_VocabGenSuccess
data.comment: Toast success (param order: total, new, linked)

data.name: ResourceEdit_VocabGenSuccessWithDuplicates
data.value: Generated {0} words: {1} new, {2} linked, {3} skipped (already in resource)

data.name: Settings_PromptLanguageHelp
data.value: Choose which side of the vocab card is shown as the prompt.

data.name: Settings_ModalitiesHelp
data.value: Choose which cues to show for the prompt. If a photo isn't available, the quiz falls back to text.

data.name: Settings_ModalityRequired
data.value: At least one question modality is required. Falling back to text.

data.name: VocabWordEdit_AssociationsHelp
data.value: Select resources to associate with this word.

data.name: VocabWordEdit_TermsRequired
data.value: Both target and native language terms are required.

data.name: VocabWordEdit_FamiliarTrust
data.value: Got it -- we trust you on this one. We will check in occasionally to keep it fresh.

data.name: Vocabulary_DuplicatesFocused
data.value: Focused on {0} so you can manage this word's copies faster.

data.name: Vocabulary_DuplicatesNoRecords
data.value: No duplicate records matched this scan.

data.name: Vocabulary_DuplicatesFoundCount
data.value: Found {0} group(s) of duplicate words with {1} extra record(s).

data.name: Vocabulary_PopulateLemmasComplete
data.value: Lemma population complete: updated {0} of {1} words

data.name: Vocabulary_NoWordsMatch
data.value: No words match the current filter.

data.name: Vocabulary_BulkUpdateNoProfile
data.value: No active user profile. Please select a profile first.

data.name: Auth_SignInOrSelectUser
data.value: Sign in to your account or select a local user to continue.

data.name: Auth_DeleteConfirmMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete profile "{0}"? This removes the user and all associated data. This cannot be undone.
data.comment: Delete confirmation message with profile name

data.name: Auth_ServerAuthRequired
data.value: Server authentication required. Please sign in first.

data.name: Login_InvalidCredentials
data.value: Invalid email or password. Please try again.

data.name: Login_NotAvailable
data.value: Email/password login is not available with the current authentication configuration.

data.name: Login_ConnectionError
data.value: Cannot reach the server. Please check your connection and try again.

data.name: Login_UnexpectedError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

data.name: Register_VerificationSent
data.value: We sent a confirmation link to {0}. Please verify your email address, then sign in.

data.name: Register_NotAvailable
data.value: Registration is not available with the current authentication configuration.

data.name: Register_Failed
data.value: Registration failed. Please check your information and try again.

data.name: ForgotPassword_Instructions
data.value: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

data.name: ForgotPassword_ResetSent
data.value: If an account with that email exists, a password reset link has been sent.

data.name: Onboarding_SetupJourney
data.value: Let's set up your language learning journey.

data.name: Onboarding_StudyDuration
data.value: How long do you want to study each day?

data.name: Onboarding_CreateStarterContent
data.value: Would you like us to create starter learning content for you?

data.name: Onboarding_GeneratingVocab
data.value: Generating starter vocabulary (this may take a moment)

data.name: Onboarding_SkipSetup
data.value: Skip -- I'll set up my own

data.name: Import_NoTranscripts
data.value: No transcripts found for this video.

data.name: Import_PolishingFailed
data.value: AI polishing failed. You can still save the current text.

data.name: ChannelDetail_EnterFullURL
data.value: Enter the full YouTube channel URL (e.g., https://www.youtube.com/@channelname)

data.name: ChannelDetail_MonitorChannel
data.value: Monitor this channel (check for new videos automatically)

data.name: ChannelDetail_ChannelIDNotResolved
data.value: YouTube channel ID could not be resolved. Video discovery requires a valid channel ID.

data.name: ChannelDetail_NoVideosFound
data.value: No videos found. Try again later.

data.name: ChannelDetail_ImportStarted
data.value: Started import for {0} video(s). Check Import History for progress.

data.name: Feedback_DescribePlaceholder
data.value: Describe the issue or feature you'd like...

data.name: Feedback_GitHubNotice
data.value: Your feedback will be posted as a public GitHub issue on the SentenceStudio repository.

data.name: Feedback_AIUnavailable
data.value: AI enrichment unavailable — your feedback will be submitted as-is.

data.name: Feedback_PreviewFailed
data.value: Failed to generate preview. Please try again.

data.name: Feedback_SubmitFailed
data.value: Failed to submit feedback. Please try again.

data.name: DebugHealth_DebugOnly
data.value: This page is only available in Debug builds.

data.name: MinimalPair_FailedToCreate
data.value: Failed to create pair. It may already exist.

data.name: PlanSummary_Freeform
data.comment: Label for ad-hoc (non-plan) activity cluster in day summary

data.name: Common_LoadFailed
data.comment: Common: Load error toast (arg0 = exception message)

data.name: Common_SaveFailed
data.comment: Common: Save error toast (arg0 = exception message)

data.name: Common_DeleteFailed
data.comment: Common: Delete error toast (arg0 = exception message)

data.name: ResourceEdit_FileImportStatus
data.comment: ResourceEdit: File import progress (arg0 = count, arg1 = filename)

data.name: ResourceEdit_GenerateFailed
data.comment: ResourceEdit: Vocab generation failure (also used with string.Format; trailing args ignored when no placeholder)

data.name: ResourceEdit_SkippedDuplicates
data.comment: ResourceEdit: Duplicate skip count (appended to success message)

data.name: Vocabulary_StatsTotal
data.comment: Vocabulary: Stats badge (arg0 = filtered count, arg1 = total)

data.name: Vocabulary_NoMatchFilter
data.value: No words match the current filter
data.comment: Vocabulary: Empty-state when filter excludes all

data.name: VocabWordEdit_MnemonicImageUrl
data.comment: VocabWordEdit: Mnemonic image URL field label

data.name: VocabWordEdit_EncodingMemoryAids
data.comment: VocabWordEdit: Section header for encoding / mnemonic inputs

data.name: VocabWordEdit_NoResources
data.comment: VocabWordEdit: Empty state for resource-associations list

data.name: VocabWordEdit_SelectResources
data.value: Select the resources this word appears in.

data.name: VocabWordEdit_BothRequired
data.value: Both target and native terms are required.
data.comment: VocabWordEdit: Validation error when one term is missing

data.name: VocabWordEdit_FamiliarMessage
data.value: Marked as familiar. Keep reviewing to promote to Known.
data.comment: VocabWordEdit: Info toast when learning status set to Familiar

data.name: Nav_ImportContent
data.comment: Navigation menu item for import content page

data.name: Import_PasteContentLabel
data.comment: Label for text area where users paste content

data.name: Import_PastePlaceholder
data.value: Paste CSV, TSV, or plain text here...

data.name: Import_PasteHint
data.value: Paste vocabulary data in CSV or TSV format (e.g., "Korean word, English translation" per line)

data.name: Import_HasHeaderRow
data.comment: Checkbox label for header row option

data.name: Import_TargetLanguageTerm
data.comment: Table column header for target language

data.name: Import_NativeLanguageTerm
data.comment: Table column header for native language

data.name: Import_Status
data.comment: Table column header for row status

data.name: Import_CreateNewResource
data.comment: Radio option to create new resource

data.name: Import_AddToExistingResource
data.comment: Radio option to add to existing resource

data.name: Import_ResourceTitleLabel
data.comment: Label for new resource title input

data.name: Import_ResourceDescriptionLabel
data.comment: Label for new resource description input

data.name: Import_DedupMode_Skip_Help
data.value: Existing words are reused. New words are added. Safest option.

data.name: Import_DedupMode_Update_Help
data.value: WARNING: Updates native translations for ALL resources using the word. Use carefully.

data.name: Import_AiTranslated_Badge
data.comment: Short badge label shown on rows whose native term was filled in by AI translation

data.name: Import_AiTranslated_Tooltip
data.value: Translation generated by AI. Review and edit before committing.
data.comment: Tooltip explaining the AI badge on import preview rows

data.name: Import_DedupMode_ImportAll_Help
data.value: Creates new entries even if duplicates exist. May create duplicate vocabulary.
data.comment: Help text for import all mode

data.name: Import_SelectResourceRequired
data.comment: Validation error for missing resource selection

data.name: Import_NoRowsSelected
data.value: Please select at least one row to import.
data.comment: Validation error for no rows selected

data.name: Import_UpdateModeWarning
data.value: Update mode will modify existing vocabulary words across all resources.

data.name: Import_ProfileNotFound
data.comment: Error toast when profile is missing
